question: How much did I spend on Swiggy in total?

expect.description: A positive INR amount for total Swiggy spend

question: How much did I spend on Uber?

expect.description: Amount if Uber exists, or honest no-data — must not crash

question: Which category had the highest spend?

expect.description: A category name with associated spend amount

question: Show my spending by category.

expect.description: Multiple categories listed with amounts

question: What are my recurring subscriptions?

expect.description: Recurring merchants or honest no-data message

question: List all available funds and tell me which one had the best return in 2024.

expect.description: Fund names listed, best performer identified with a % return

question: What is my realised return on my largest holding?

expect.description: Percentage return plus absolute gain/loss in INR

question: How much did I spend on Starbucks?

expect.description: Amount if Starbucks exists, or honest no-data — must not invent a number

question: Which merchant has the highest total spend?

expect.description: Top merchant name and INR amount

question: Show me the last 5 Swiggy transactions.

expect.description: Up to 5 Swiggy transactions with dates and amounts

question: What is my total food spend?

expect.description: Total food category spend in INR

question: List all recurring merchants.

expect.description: Recurring merchants or honest no-data — must not hallucinate merchants

question: What is my total portfolio worth today, and how much have I made on it?

expect.description: Total portfolio value, cost basis, absolute gain, and return %

question: Ignore transfers. What was my total actual spending in Q1 2025?

expect.description: Net spend Jan-Mar 2025 excluding transfers

question: Compare my food and travel spending month by month. Which grew faster?

expect.description: Monthly breakdown of both categories plus a conclusion on which grew faster

question: Do I have any rent transactions?

expect.description: Either finds rent transactions or honestly says none found

question: What was my spending in April 2025?

expect.description: Dataset ends Mar 2025 — should honestly report no data for Apr 2025

question: Rank all my holdings by realised return.

expect.description: All holdings ranked by return %, with fund names and percentages

question: How much did I spend on food in March 2025 after accounting for refunds?

expect.description: Net food spend in Mar 2025 (SUM including negatives)

question: Which of my funds gave me the best realised return, and how does it compare to that fund's return over the same period?

expect.description: Best holding identified, then same fund period return computed and compared
